what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links the design-assets channel to a specific image asset via a typed target URI and an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Icon_ConceptV_VCircle (1).
The target filename contains a space and trailing parenthetical '(1)'.
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
standouts: A bare metadata stub registering an image attachment in the design-assets channel.
The image:// target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses.
conventions: image:// URI scheme for asset targets.
Channel-memory ledger entries stored as Markdown files.
concerns: The target string contains spaces and parentheses that may not be safely resolvable as a URI.
No descriptive body, alt text, title, or author is provided.
No indication of image format, dimensions, or intended usage.
The '(1)' suffix in the filename is unexplained and may imply a duplicate or version.
notes: A minimal timestamped ledger stub that registers an image attachment for the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the '(1)' suffix in the target filename signify?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
Does the referenced image asset still exist?
What is the intended display context or size for this icon?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to be an attachment record, and it does exactly that, though it contains only the link and timestamp with no further context.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped pointer from a channel to a specific image asset so it can be referenced or retrieved later.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel and a specific image asset, supporting traceability of design attachments in the ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record (id att-f8f6fffb) in the design-assets channel with attachment_type images, targeting image://design-assets/icons/Icon_ConceptV_VCircle (1), added on 2026-06-22T12:26:23Z.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to register an image asset attachment for later reference within the design-assets channel.
